questions.q: According to a major review highlighted by ScienceDaily on May 17, 2026, what longstanding fear regarding 'yo-yo dieting' is largely unsupported by scientific evidence?
options: That it permanently ruins metabolism and causes long-term harm
That it inevitably causes severe hair loss
That it guarantees the development of Type 1 Diabetes
That it permanently shrinks the human stomach
questions.correctText: That it permanently ruins metabolism and causes long-term harm

questions.q: As highlighted in a May 17, 2026 publication, paleontologists in Spain uncovered the best-preserved skull in Europe belonging to which plated dinosaur?
Reported on May 17, 2026, researchers from Trinity College Dublin discovered a 1,200-year-old manuscript in Rome containing one of the oldest surviving versions of which text?
In an astronomical update for May 17, 2026, Mashable's Science section reported that the Moon's phase for the night would feature what level of visibility?
